Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
TVTX dominates today's ranking at #1 with a 94.1 composite score, driven by extraordinary consistency across all timeframes—its 1-year return of 287% paired with a 4-out-of-5 ratio pass rate and perfect SMA alignment (above all four major moving averages) create a textbook momentum setup. The stock's resilience is exceptional, with a 0.72 bad_spy_score meaning it barely declines on market weakness days, and it outperforms SPY by 266% over the year while staying above QQQ's gain by 255%. However, a notable weak point emerges in the 6-month ratio (0.54), suggesting momentum may have decelerated in the mid-term after the explosive 1-month run of 33%. ADTTF ranks second with a 278% 1-year return and strong week-over-week performance (+41% vs SPY's +1.5%), but its 3.9 bad_spy_score—nearly 5.5 times worse than TVTX—indicates significantly higher volatility during market downturns, and its ratio consistency is only 3-of-5 passes, reflecting choppier intermediate-term patterns.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
